Efficient Liquid Filling Machine For Packaging Industry

Shanghai Npack’s liquid filling equipment are not only a masterpiece of precision engineering, it is also designed to meet the diverse needs of the liquid packaging industry. It is unique in its ability to handle both aqueous liquids and highly viscous formulations with ease and innovative power. Through advanced technology and craftsmanship, these series of fillers offer unrivalled precision, efficiency and versatility in the liquid filling process. Not only can it be applied to containers of various sizes and shapes, but it can also realize automated operation, quick adjustment as well as intelligent monitoring, which greatly improves production efficiency and quality stability on the production line. Therefore, in the current increasingly competitive market environment, Npack’s liquid filling equipment will undoubtedly become a trend-setting product in the industry.

Contact for more

Innovative Liquid Filling Solutions

Liquid Filling Machines utilize advanced technology and precision techniques to meet high precision and high efficiency liquid packaging needs in various industries. Whether you need to fill medicines in the pharmaceutical field or a variety of flavors in the food and beverage industry, the machine can provide superior performance tailored to customer needs.In addition, in areas such as beauty cosmetics or chemical solutions, liquid filling machines can also take advantage of their versatile solutions to ensure a stable and reliable product packaging process. Through constant innovation and technological improvements, liquid filling machines will continue to provide reliable, efficient and standards-compliant packaging solutions for a wide range of industries.

Enhanced Productivity and Quality

Efficient Filling With Motion Controller

Utilize the motion control system to deliver precise filling, capping, and packaging solutions for maximizing production output.
  • Ensure consistency and quality of each bottle of product.
  • Minimize downtime and increase production capacity.
  • Utilize reliable high-speed equipment to meet market demands.
Bottling Solutions Here

Selction liquid Filling Solutions for You

Liquid filling machines are a kind of equipment that are classified according to different filling mechanisms, the nature of the liquid handled, the type of filling container, and the degree of automation. They play an important role in various industries and can fulfil specific industry requirements for accuracy, efficiency, and adaptability. Below are the main types of liquid filling machines:
Choosing the Right Filling Machine for Your Product
The characteristics of your product—such as viscosity, foaming tendency, or presence of particulates—are key factors in determining which bottle filling machine will deliver the best results. The ultimate goal is to dose a precise amount of product into each container, ensuring both quality and shelf appeal that sets your offering apart from the competition. Each filler technology excels with a specific range of liquids, so matching machine to application is essential..

Manual, Semi-Automatic, and Fully Automatic Filling Machines: Understanding the Differences

When it comes to liquid filling machines, the level of automation you choose can dramatically impact efficiency, productivity, and adaptability on the production line. Here’s a clear look at how manual, semi-automatic, and fully automatic liquid fillers differ—and when each solution shines:

Manual Filling Machines
Manual fillers are operated entirely by hand. They’re suitable for small-scale productions or specialty batches where flexibility and low investment are priorities. These systems are best used for artisanal products or when only a limited quantity needs to be filled each day. While manual fillers offer simplicity and control over each step, they require more operator involvement, resulting in slower speeds and a higher degree of variability compared to automated options.

Semi-Automatic Filling Machines
Semi-automatic machines bridge the gap between manual and full automation. In these systems, an operator initiates each fill cycle, but the machine handles measuring and dispensing the liquid with precision. These machines are ideal for growing businesses looking to improve accuracy and throughput without committing to the resource requirements of fully automated lines. Semi-automatic fillers deliver consistent fills, help minimize waste, and can typically handle a broader range of container sizes with quick changes.

Fully Automatic Filling Machines
Fully automatic systems elevate productivity to new heights. These machines integrate seamlessly with capping, labeling, and packaging equipment, allowing for continuous, unattended operation. With advanced sensors, motion controllers, and programmable settings, fully automatic fillers deliver maximum speed and accuracy—essential for large-scale production and high-demand environments. Automated adjustments ensure consistent fill levels, reduce labor costs, and minimize downtime, making them the go-to choice for companies demanding top-tier output and efficiency.

By selecting a filling solution that aligns with your production requirements and growth ambitions, you can ensure both reliable performance and robust flexibility on your packaging line.

Volumetric Filling Machines

Equipment that utilises a piston and cylinder mechanism to accurately fill a specific volume. It is suitable for applications that require accurate filling of viscous liquids or products containing particles. It ensures product quality and productivity and is ideal for viscous liquids or products containing particles. For example, piston fillers are excellent for thick sauces or salsas, but may not be the best choice for thin, free-flowing liquids like perfumes.

Net Weight Filling Machines

Containers are filled according to their weight, using a balance to ensure an accurate fill level for each container. This approach is suitable for chemical, food and beverage production where tight control of product quantity is required. Net weight filling is especially valuable when each drop counts, as in the case of high-value chemicals or edible oils.

Level Filling Machines

An overflow design designed to fill containers to a specific level regardless of internal volume changes. This type of machine is ideal for situations where a high fill level is required and where transparent containers are used for packaging. Overflow fillers work particularly well with foamy liquids such as industrial cleaners, ensuring a consistent visual fill level, but are less suitable for thicker, viscous products.

Time-based Filling Machines

Time Gravity Fillers use a timer to control the filling time, suitable for thin, free-flowing liquids. The simplicity of this method makes it a cost-effective solution for certain applications. This approach is most effective for consistent, water-like products where exact volume is less critical than speed and simplicity.

Liquid Pump Filling Machine

Adapt with a pump measuring technology dosing liquid and viscous liquid, such as lobe pump, peristaltic pumps, and gear pumps. These machines offer flexibility for a wide range of viscosities and are adaptable for both small and large-scale production.

Flow Meter Filling Machine

Flow meters are used to measure the volume of liquids and play a key role in actual production. Flow meter fillers are particularly suitable for high-value or variable viscosity products, providing real-time monitoring and precise control over each fill.

Frequently Asked Questions

Our equipments are suitable for filling a wide range of liqud, semi liquid and viscous products

What products Can Be Filled Using Your equipment?

Our equipment is suitable for filling a wide range of products, such as Edible Oils, Juices, Sodas, Sauces (soy, ketchup, mayo), Jams, Yogurt, Honey, Syrups, Vinegar, Dairy Products, Pastes (tomato, curry) for food industry;Shampoo, Conditioner, Body Wash, Lotions, Creams, Serums, Perfumes, Nail Polish, Hair Gel, Shaving Cream, Sunscreen for Cosmetics & Personal Care products;Syrups, Cough Mixtures, Disinfectants, Ointments, Gels, Eye/Ear Drops, Nasal Sprays, Medical Creams for Pharmaceutical & Healthcare;Detergents, Laundry Softeners, Bleach, Cleaners, Disinfectants, Motor Oils, Lubricants, Greases, Agricultural Chemicals for Chemicals & Household;Engine Oils, Gear Oils, Hydraulic Fluids, Lubricating Greases, Adhesives, Sealants, Solvents, Anti-freeze for Industrial & Automotive.

What is the process for developing a filling or dosing solution Customzied to client needs?

Every project begins with a close evaluation of your production requirements, product characteristics, and application environment. Our team collaborates directly with you to identify your technical specifications, such as production speed, container type, product viscosity, and industry regulations.

Once we have a thorough understanding of your needs, we design a customized solution—selecting the best filling technology, integrating automation where helpful, and ensuring that all technical and regulatory standards are met. Throughout the process, you’ll receive detailed consultations and prototypes as needed, with your feedback helping to fine-tune the system.

Before final delivery, every custom solution is rigorously tested to confirm reliable performance under your real-world operating conditions, so you can expect seamless integration into your existing line.

Can Your Equipment Handle Different Bottle Sizes?
Our equipment is designed to accommodate various bottle sizes for flexibility in production needs.
What Sets Your Capping Machine Apart From Others?
Our capping machine stands out for its precision and efficiency, ensuring secure sealing every time.
Do You Offer Customization Options For Packaging Solutions?

Yes, we provide customization options to tailor packaging solutions according to specific client requirements.
